title: slice()
subtitle: Copy part of an array
goal: Learn to copy part of an array using slice().
explanation: slice() creates a new array from part of an existing array.
The original array does not change.
The first argument specifies the starting index.
The second argument specifies the index at which copying stops.
The ending index is not included in the result.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: Imagine a loaf of bread. You cut off a few slices for yourself, but the original loaf remains intact.

remember: The original array does not change.
The ending index is not included.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners often think slice(1, 3) includes the element at index 3. In fact, it copies only up to that index.
